items.description: Our Batang Holy Basketball Boys Elementary Team has once again proven their determination, teamwork, and perseverance by capturing their third consecutive APPSAA Championship.
items.title: 🏆 THREE-PEAT CHAMPIONS!🏆
🏆 APPSAA Update | Congratulations, Batang Holy! 🏆
items.description: Congratulations to our Batang Holy athletes for their outstanding performances and victories in the ongoing Angono Public & Private Schools Athletic Association (APPSAA) games!
